{{Quote|The short guy is Usu Cley—he's from Rimsoo Five, about ninety kilometers toward the south pole from here. Cley was the Ninth Fleet Middle-Mass Champion two years running. I've seen him fight a couple of times—he's very good.|[[Jos Vondar]], to [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]]|<ref name="Battle Surgeons">''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ninth Fleet''' was one of the primary [[Navy/Legends|naval]] units of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the war, the Ninth [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] received a distress signal from the merchant vessel ''[[Deyvus]]'' and [[Mission to the Deyvus|dispatched]] the freighter [[Twilight/Legends|''Twilight'']] to rescue the crew.<ref name="TOTT">{{TCWComicCite|6.5|Terror on the Twilight|Terror on the ''Twilight''}}</ref>
